title: hieracium olivaceum subsp. perintegrum
intro: Hieracium olivaceum subsp. perintegrum, also known as the olive hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium olivaceum subsp. perintegrum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
